software_summary: A lightweight Git desktop tool that pairs bare repositories with working repositories. Supports local disk and LAN shared directories, making it easy to set up a local Git remote repository.
system_requirements:
Based on Tkinter (Python standard library, no additional installation required), with a custom-built VeilTk UI toolkit for the interface

Requirements:
- Git 2.0+ (Tested with Git 2.51.0)
- Git LFS 2.10+ (Tested with Git LFS 3.7.0)
- Python 3.8+ (Tested with Python 3.12)
lfs_not_installed: Git LFS is not installed, please install Git LFS first
git_exe_not_found: Git executable not found in directory: {path}
lfs_version_not_found: Unable to get Git LFS version, please ensure Git LFS is installed
lfs_version_incompatible: Git LFS version {version} is incompatible, need version 2.10 or higher to support local disk protocol
bare_repo_path_empty: Local bare repo directory cannot be empty
work_repo_path_empty: Work repo directory cannot be empty
bare_repo_path_invalid: Local bare repo directory is invalid or does not exist: {path}
work_repo_path_invalid: Work repo directory is invalid or does not exist: {path}
git_version_incompatible: Git version {version} is incompatible, need version 2.10 or higher

Git executable not found on your system.

Please go to the Settings page and specify the Git executable path manually.
